This is a bunch of text between two more intricate tables. There isn’t a ton to say.  Halcyon is the capital of the empire of Apollyean. A wall-less city of 80,000, Halcyon sits  beside the Crystal Falls, on the shore of the Lake of the Ancestors, and at the start of the  Mirrorbrook. A common saying of Halcyon is to see your forebears in your own reflection.  This may be in part due to the locality of the Reflections’ Crest, the cliff face that is the end  of the El’drath’el Range. In this cliff, it's said one may see  spirits floating through the   throughways and streets.

Here is a second text chunk that will live between the two tables. The 8th century  BCE saw the rise of organized city-states along the coast. By 750 BCE, at least five fortified  ports had emerged, each governed by a council of elders and a rotating magistrate whose  term lasted one year. Records etched into clay tablets—dated paleographically to circa 700  BCE—describe grain shipments, naval patrol schedules, and treaty renewals.

• Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text.  • It has roots in a piece of classical Latin literature from 45 BC, making it over 2000  years old.   • Richard McClintock, a Latin professor at Hampden-Sydney College in Virginia,  looked up one of the more obscure Latin words, consectetur, from a Lorem Ipsum  passage, and going through the cites of the word in classical literature, discovered  the undoubtable source.  • Lorem Ipsum comes from sections 1.10.32 and 1.10.33 of "de Finibus Bonorum et  Malorum" (The Extremes of Good and Evil) by Cicero, written in 45 BC.
